channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-10313] sanity-lfsck test_33: DQACQ failed with -22
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah_lw <wei3.liu@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/18647c2e-d69b-11e7-9c63-52540065bddc.

The sub-test test_33 failed with the following error:

Timeout occurred after 489 mins, last suite running was sanity-lfsck, restarting cluster to continue tests

OSS dmesg

[25718.675961] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: onyx-47vm2.onyx.hpdd.intel.com: executing set_default_debug vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck all 4
[25720.516517] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark Using TIMEOUT=20
[25720.718903] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Using TIMEOUT=20
[25721.523801] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.lustre-OST0000.quota_slave.enabled
[26024.862676] LustreError: 22103:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) $$$ DQACQ failed with -22, flags:0x4 qsd:lustre-OST0007 qtype:usr id:500 enforced:1 granted:1048576 pending:0 waiting:0 req:1 usage:0 qunit:0 qtune:0 edquot:0
[26024.864885] LustreError: 22103:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) Skipped 85 previous similar messages
[26684.862918] LustreError: 22102:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) $$$ DQACQ failed with -22, flags:0x4 qsd:lustre-OST0006 qtype:usr id:500 enforced:1 granted:1048576 pending:0 waiting:0 req:1 usage:0 qunit:0 qtune:0 edquot:0
[26684.864917] LustreError: 22102:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) Skipped 87 previous similar messages
[27344.862883] LustreError: 22102:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) $$$ DQACQ failed with -22, flags:0x4 qsd:lustre-OST0007 qtype:usr id:500 enforced:1 granted:1048576 pending:0 waiting:0 req:1 usage:0 qunit:0 qtune:0 edquot:0
[27344.864929] LustreError: 22102:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) Skipped 87 previous similar messages
[28004.862800] LustreError: 22103:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) $$$ DQACQ failed with -22, flags:0x4 qsd:lustre-OST0007 qtype:usr id:500 enforced:1 granted:1048576 pending:0 waiting:0 req:1 usage:0 qunit:0 qtune:0 edquot:0
[28004.864930] LustreError: 22103:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) Skipped 87 previous similar messages
[28664.862848] LustreError: 22103:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) $$$ DQACQ failed with -22, flags:0x4 qsd:lustre-OST0004 qtype:grp id:500 enforced:1 granted:1048576 pending:0 waiting:0 req:1 usage:0 qunit:0 qtune:0 edquot:0
[28664.862851] LustreError: 22102:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) $$$ DQACQ failed with -22, flags:0x4 qsd:lustre-OST0007 qtype:grp id:500 enforced:1 granted:1048576 pending:0 waiting:0 req:1 usage:0 qunit:0 qtune:0 edquot:0
[28664.862856] LustreError: 22102:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) Skipped 83 previous similar messages
[28664.867900] LustreError: 22103:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) Skipped 5 previous similar messages
item.environment: client and server: 2.10.2 RHEL7.4 zfs DNE

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
